mapper.select: SELECT DISTINCT m.* FROM sys_menu m INNER JOIN sys_role_menu rm ON rm.menu_id = m.id INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON ur.role_id = rm.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND m.enabled = 1 ORDER BY m.level ASC, m.sort_order ASC
SELECT menu_id FROM sys_role_menu WHERE role_id = #{roleId}
